allowed_response_subjects: Codex subagent or another explicitly approved non-Claude model/agent surface

approval_scope_needed.response_subject_surface: Codex subagent or another explicitly approved non-Claude model/agent surface
approval_scope_needed.retry_policy: one response per prompt; no hidden retries; transport failures recorded separately

forbidden_response_subjects: human expert panel as required gate
malformed_output_policy: Record malformed or incomplete outputs in the response manifest; do not replace them.
retry_policy: One response per prompt unless a predeclared transport failure produces no model output. No hidden retries. Malformed or incomplete outputs are recorded.
